upgrade_source: Wikipedia (Franklin Avenue station, Fulton Street; Franklin Avenue Shuttle); MTA records
notes: Franklin Avenue Shuttle station completely rebuilt 1998-1999 at cost of $74 million (covers entire shuttle line rebuild). Reopened October 18, 1999. Two elevators installed: one from shuttle platform to overpass/main fare control/southbound IND platform, plus one additional elevator. These elevators make the entire Franklin Av station complex (shuttle + A/C) ADA-accessible.
